question_title: How should I structure autonomous AI agent workflows for production reliability in a TypeScript/Next.js fintech platform?
why_this_action: Current lane selection correctly favored StackOverflow demand capture, but the draft style was too conversational and promo-adjacent for StackOverflow norms.
A higher-quality answer asset improves the odds that this lane can become real qualified traffic instead of another internal-only draft.
Reddit remains fail-closed, Apollo is already in a measurement window until 2026-05-30, and curator/directory lanes are already saturated with fresh submissions today.

summary: rewrote StackOverflow answer generation to be vendor-neutral first, artifact- and verification-led, and more native to StackOverflow style
removed weak conversational endings and the always-on promo footer
kept Codeberg-first mention only where it naturally fits the answer

expected_outcome: A stronger high-intent StackOverflow answer asset that is more likely to survive posting/reuse and drive qualified Codeberg-first evaluator traffic when a live posting path is available.

measurement_window.success_metric: This answer gets posted or reused on a live demand-capture surface and contributes to attributable qualified repo inspection or Codeberg adoption movement.
measurement_window.kill_condition: If the StackOverflow lane still cannot convert drafts into live placement by 2026-05-30, replace it with a different executable high-intent demand-capture lane.
